driver.name: freedreno
driver.hint: freedreno, llvmpipe, softpipe, and swr have fake Multisample anti-aliasing support

driver.name: llvmpipe
driver.hint: freedreno, llvmpipe, softpipe, and swr have fake Multisample anti-aliasing support

driver.name: softpipe
driver.hint: freedreno, llvmpipe, softpipe, and swr have fake Multisample anti-aliasing support

mesa.hint: all - but needs GLX/EGL extension to be useful

api.name: Extensions that are not part of any OpenGL or OpenGL ES version

version.name: Extensions that are not part of any OpenGL or OpenGL ES version

mesa.hint: started (airlied for core and Gallium, idr for i965)
but Chia-I Wu did some related work in 2014
- GLES2 extension based on OpenGL ES 3.0 feature
